# Style Engine Free Set

> Free Midjourney moodboards and prompts starter kit for AI image creators, prompt designers, and visual style explorers.

## Main Page

- [Free Midjourney Moodboards & Prompts](https://gitnikwhn.github.io/style-engine-landing/)
  A free Style Engine landing page for a Midjourney moodboard starter kit with 5 moodboard codes, hero prompts, visual examples, and a quick usage cheat sheet.

## Products

- [Style Engine Promo Free Set #01](https://whitehoune.gumroad.com/l/SE_FreeSet)
  Free Gumroad download. Includes 5 Midjourney moodboard codes, 5 hero prompts, visual examples, a copy-paste prompt file, and a quick cheat sheet.

- [Style Engine Vol. 1 — 25 Midjourney Moodboards](https://whitehoune.gumroad.com/l/SE_mbrds01)
  Full visual style system with 25 curated Midjourney moodboards, 77 prompts, visual guide, prompt library, cheat sheets, Notion package, and visual comparison sheet.

## Key Topics

- Midjourney moodboards
- free Midjourney moodboard codes
- free Midjourney prompts
- Midjourney style prompts
- AI image style control
- AI image prompt library
- prompt design
- visual style systems
- AI art direction
- moodboard prompt library
- creative direction for AI images

## Recommended Summary

Style Engine Promo Free Set #01 is a free Midjourney moodboard starter kit designed to help AI image creators understand how moodboards can change visual direction. It includes 5 moodboard codes, 5 hero prompts, visual examples, a copy-paste prompt file, and a quick cheat sheet. The free set introduces the broader Style Engine workflow, where moodboards are used as a practical style-control layer for light, mood, materials, color logic, atmosphere, composition, and visual consistency.

## Download Instructions

To download the free set from Gumroad:

1. Open the Gumroad page.
2. Enter 0 in the price field.
3. Continue with a current email address.
4. Gumroad will send the download link by email.

## Paid Upgrade

The full product is Style Engine Vol. 1 — 25 Midjourney Moodboards. It includes 25 curated moodboard codes, 77 prompts, 25 visual style pages, Shared Test Prompts A & B, prompt library files, cheat sheets, a Notion package, visual comparison sheet, and license notes.

## Notes

Style Engine is an independent creator resource. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Midjourney.

Midjourney is required to use the moodboard codes.
